# oDesigns — Complete Guide

> AI-powered social media post generator and design tool. Create, schedule, and publish stunning social media designs, ads, and app store previews across all platforms from one dashboard.

## What is oDesigns?

oDesigns is an AI-powered SaaS platform that transforms how businesses create social media content. Instead of hiring designers or spending hours in complex design tools, users simply describe what they want — or paste their website URL — and AI generates complete, professional social media post designs with matching captions, ready to publish.

Designs can be exported as PNG images or published directly to connected social media accounts.

## Capabilities

### Content Generation
- AI generates complete social media post designs from a text description or URL
- Creates app store screenshots and preview images for iOS and Android
- Generates ads and promotional content for any social platform
- Multiple design styles: bold, minimal, energetic, elegant, and more
- Each generation produces multiple unique design variations to choose from

### Publishing & Scheduling
- Direct publishing to Instagram, Facebook, Threads, and Twitter/X
- Bulk scheduling with a visual calendar view
- Queue management for planned content
- Multi-account support for agencies

### Brand Management
- Upload brand colors, fonts, and logos
- AI automatically applies brand elements to every design
- Workspace-level branding for managing multiple clients
- Consistent brand identity across all generated content

### Templates & Design
- Pre-built template library for common social media needs
- App store screenshot templates with device mockups
- Seasonal campaign templates
- Product showcase and portfolio templates
- Restaurant and food-focused templates

### Export & Flexibility
- PNG download for individual posts
- ZIP bulk export for multiple posts
- Multiple aspect ratios: 1:1 (Instagram), 4:5 (portrait), 9:16 (Stories/Reels), 16:9 (landscape)
- Drag-and-drop editing for fine-tuning designs

### Multi-Language Support
Full interface and content generation in:
- English
- Arabic (with full RTL support)
- Spanish
- Portuguese
- French
- Turkish
- Indonesian

## Who Uses oDesigns?

### Small Business Owners
Create professional social media content without design skills or agency costs. Generate a week's worth of posts in minutes.

### Marketing Agencies
Manage multiple client brands from one platform. Each workspace maintains separate branding, social accounts, and content calendars.

### E-Commerce Stores
Generate product showcase posts, sale announcements, and promotional content. Paste product URLs and AI creates designs from product information.

### Content Creators
Maintain consistent posting schedules with bulk generation and scheduling. Create content batches in advance.

### Restaurant & Food Businesses
Showcase menu items, daily specials, and promotions with food-focused templates and AI-generated designs.

### Real Estate Agents
Create property listing posts, open house announcements, and market update content.

### App Developers
Generate professional app store screenshots and promotional materials with device mockups and clean layouts.

## Pricing

oDesigns offers tiered pricing:
- **Free Plan**: Core features with limited monthly generations
- **Pro Plan**: Higher generation limits, all templates, priority support
- **Business Plan**: Maximum limits, team collaboration, advanced features

Current pricing details: https://odesigns.app/pricing
